name: Premier Limousine Svc
recent_news: No public news. Small Fort Smith, AR livery/limousine operator; data flagged special-needs but no evidence of school-bus or special-needs student transport contracts.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Appears to be a limousine/livery service, not a school-bus contractor. Sub-scale (8 employees, ~$470K revenue) with no evidence of district contracts.

name: Starship Transportation
recent_news: Yellow Pages lists business as CLOSED as of recent listings. Cumming, GA micro-operator.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Listed as closed; micro-scale (5 employees, ~$449K revenue) with no school-district contract evidence.

name: L & E Transportation
recent_news: Multiple unrelated L&E entities exist (Lake Wales FL NEMT, NY/NJ/CT car service, FL trucking). Kissimmee entity has minimal web presence; appears to be NEMT, not school bus.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Likely NEMT/medical transport rather than school-bus contractor; micro-scale (5 employees, ~$403K revenue).

name: Alter Ride
recent_news: Listed in small business directories as 'Van Alter-Ride Service' in Dunstable, MA; sales reported $50K-$99K; 1-4 staff. Walter F. Alterisio is also a longtime Dunstable town official.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Single-vehicle taxi/van service operating since 1970; far below tuck-in scale and no school-district contracts identified.

name: Brito's Transportation
recent_news: Active small NEMT/disability transport operator in Santa Ana, CA. Operating since 2013 per D&B; transports patients to medical appointments; certified drivers for disabled passengers. No school-bus contracts identified.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Micro-scale NEMT (medical appointments / wheelchair) rather than school-bus contractor; 2 employees, ~$150K revenue.
